name: Three-Cheese Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tomato sauce, spaghetti sauce mix, and 1 1/2 cups water in a saucepan.
2. Simmer uncovered for 10-12 minutes.
3. In a bowl, combine 1 cup mozzarella cheese, cottage cheese, parmesan cheese, eggs, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper. Mix lightly.
4. Stuff each manicotti shell with about 1/4 cup of the cheese mixture.
5. Pour half of the sauce into a 12 x 7 1/2 x 2-inch baking dish.
6. Arrange the manicotti in the dish, pour the remaining sauce over them.
7. Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella evenly on top.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F until bubbly, for 25-30 minutes.
